SLIM STAINLESS STEEL MEMOBOTTLE IN WHITE

Johnny says:

I love it because it's super easy to carry and travel with (fits nicely in a bag), and the slim shape makes it feel really practical day-to-day.

A5 ORIGINAL MEMOBOTTLE

Rafael says:

I love it because it's super easy to carry and travel with (fits nicely in a bag), and the slim shape makes it feel really practical day-to-day.

SAVE ON ORIGINAL MEMOBOTTLES

SLIM MEMOBOTTLE BUNDLE IN WILD PLUM

Lyle says:

It holds a great amount of water, and the slim, flat profile makes it perfect for everyday carry. The unique shape fits effortlessly into my daily bag (the A3 Daily Tote), and the Wild Plum colour is both on-trend and timeless.

SAVE ON COLOURED BUNDLES
